## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss onboarding process for a new customer (Strapi) and assign related tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/y8o8dA7j_mwrwNMHMJZcCsNudyA5Jqs6?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Need to send welcome email to new customer's main contact (Victor) after contract is fully signed](https://fathom.video/share/y8o8dA7j_mwrwNMHMJZcCsNudyA5Jqs6?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
  - [Welcome email should ask for invoicing contact, preferred kickoff date/time, and attendee list](https://fathom.video/share/y8o8dA7j_mwrwNMHMJZcCsNudyA5Jqs6?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [Send first invoice and W9 after contract is signed](https://fathom.video/share/y8o8dA7j_mwrwNMHMJZcCsNudyA5Jqs6?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Create task to send welcome email a few days before kickoff/effective date](https://fathom.video/share/y8o8dA7j_mwrwNMHMJZcCsNudyA5Jqs6?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)

## Topics

### New Customer Onboarding

  - [Strapi is about to sign contract, will be new customer](https://fathom.video/share/y8o8dA7j_mwrwNMHMJZcCsNudyA5Jqs6?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [After contract is fully signed:](https://fathom.video/share/y8o8dA7j_mwrwNMHMJZcCsNudyA5Jqs6?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [Move deal to "Closed Won" stage in Atio CRM](https://fathom.video/share/y8o8dA7j_mwrwNMHMJZcCsNudyA5Jqs6?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
      - [Download finalized contract from PandaDoc](https://fathom.video/share/y8o8dA7j_mwrwNMHMJZcCsNudyA5Jqs6?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
      - [Send welcome email to main contact (likely person who signed)](https://fathom.video/share/y8o8dA7j_mwrwNMHMJZcCsNudyA5Jqs6?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)

### Welcome Email

  - [Draft welcome message together](https://fathom.video/share/y8o8dA7j_mwrwNMHMJZcCsNudyA5Jqs6?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [Ask for:](https://fathom.video/share/y8o8dA7j_mwrwNMHMJZcCsNudyA5Jqs6?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
      - [Invoicing contact (AP@, finance@, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/y8o8dA7j_mwrwNMHMJZcCsNudyA5Jqs6?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
      - [Preferred kickoff date/time (usually same as contract effective date)](https://fathom.video/share/y8o8dA7j_mwrwNMHMJZcCsNudyA5Jqs6?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
      - [Attendee list for kickoff meeting](https://fathom.video/share/y8o8dA7j_mwrwNMHMJZcCsNudyA5Jqs6?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [Send via Slack and email](https://fathom.video/share/y8o8dA7j_mwrwNMHMJZcCsNudyA5Jqs6?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Attach kickoff template docs](https://fathom.video/share/y8o8dA7j_mwrwNMHMJZcCsNudyA5Jqs6?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Marcel will CC Alice on initial emails as an example](https://fathom.video/share/y8o8dA7j_mwrwNMHMJZcCsNudyA5Jqs6?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)

### Invoicing

  - [Send first invoice and W9 after contract signed](https://fathom.video/share/y8o8dA7j_mwrwNMHMJZcCsNudyA5Jqs6?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Payment terms are Net 30](https://fathom.video/share/y8o8dA7j_mwrwNMHMJZcCsNudyA5Jqs6?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Create task to send welcome email to Victor (Strapi) a few days before kickoff/effective date](https://fathom.video/share/y8o8dA7j_mwrwNMHMJZcCsNudyA5Jqs6?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [Draft welcome email template together](https://fathom.video/share/y8o8dA7j_mwrwNMHMJZcCsNudyA5Jqs6?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [Marcel will record loom video documenting full process](https://fathom.video/share/y8o8dA7j_mwrwNMHMJZcCsNudyA5Jqs6?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Alice will handle next new customer onboarding more independently](https://fathom.video/share/y8o8dA7j_mwrwNMHMJZcCsNudyA5Jqs6?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
